notes: Round 5 pilot plan. R1-R4 pilots all complete (22/22 tasks). R5 focuses on pre-writing consolidation experiments to strengthen the two primary contributions before writing phase. Writing gate already met (go_write=true from R4). All R5 experiments are optional-but-strengthening, not blocking.

pilots.name: R5-A: ITAC Real Activations Pilot
pilots.description: Process 100 text tokens from Wikitext-2 through GPT-2 Small. Identify parent-positive windows for at least 3 late-absorbed latents at GPT-2 L6. Run ITAC correction on those windows.
pilots.pass_criteria: At least 3 late-absorbed latents evaluated with n_parent_positive >= 5 windows each. FN rate computable before and after ITAC. Any result acceptable — both null and positive outcomes are informative.
pilots.fail_action: If parent-positive windows too rare in 100 tokens: increase to 1,000 tokens. If GPT-2 L6 late-absorbed latent set is empty: use L10 or identify late-absorbed from phase2_taxonomy GPT-2 equivalent. Never hard-block.

pilots.name: R5-B: Taxonomy Robustness Pilot on L5-16k
pilots.description: Run taxonomy classification on 100 absorbed latents from Gemma Scope L5-16k. Use weight-only criterion. Compute early/late/diffuse fractions at tau=0.3.
pilots.pass_criteria: Taxonomy classification runs on at least 1 new SAE config. Early fraction computed at tau=0.3. Result is informative regardless of value.
pilots.fail_action: If Neuronpedia proxy labels unavailable for L5-16k: use EDA threshold (EDA > 0.7) as absorbed proxy. Document explicitly.

pilots.name: R5-C: Controlled Dictionary Experiment Pilot
pilots.description: Run feedforward vs. OMP on 100 synthetic activations using Gemma Scope L12-16k decoder weights. Compute absorption rate for 5 parent-child pairs under each encoding.
pilots.pass_criteria: OMP encoding runs without error on 100 synthetic activations with K=16. Absorption rate computed for feedforward and OMP on at least 5 parent-child pairs. Ratio computed.
pilots.fail_action: If OMP from sklearn fails: implement ISTA (iterative soft-thresholding) as fallback. If still failing: skip R5-C and note as future work.

pilots.name: R5-D: Label Quality Sensitivity Pilot
pilots.description: CPU-only. Compute AUROC at 3 noise rates (0%, 20%, 50%) on GPT-2 L6 direct label set (18 positives). Verify sensitivity curve shape.
pilots.pass_criteria: AUROC computed at all 3 noise rates. Sensitivity direction confirmed (higher noise → lower AUROC). Minimum label quality threshold estimated.
pilots.fail_action: Always GO — this is a deterministic computation on existing data.

round5_decision_tree.description: Round 5 pilot gates — all outcomes publishable. R5 strengthens rather than unblocks writing. go_write=true already confirmed from R4.

gate_r5a.strong_pass: FN reduction > 10% on late-absorbed → restore ITAC as minor contribution in appendix
gate_r5a.weak_pass_null: FN reduction < 5% → confirms H5 falsification extends to real activations (stronger negative result)
gate_r5a.any_result: publishable — adds to appendix as H5 final verdict

gate_r5b.pass: early > 50% in >= 1 new config → early-dominance evidence extended beyond L12
gate_r5b.fail: early < 50% in new configs → note layer-dependency of early-dominance; taxonomy finding scoped to L12
gate_r5b.any_result: publishable — either confirms or adds nuance to Contribution 2

gate_r5c.pass: OMP absorption < 50% of feedforward → encoder architecture implicated in early absorption
gate_r5c.fail: OMP absorption ≈ feedforward → sparsity landscape dominant; consistent with Tang et al. theory

gate_r5d.always_pass: CPU deterministic computation on existing data. Always runs to completion.

completed_rounds_archive.round_4_status: ALL 7/7 TASKS COMPLETE (r4d skipped as optional; writing gate met)

key_r4_results.r4a_eda_direct_validation: GPT-2 L6 AUROC=0.650 (direct labels, PASS); GPT-2 L10 AUROC=0.336 (reversed, FAIL). EDA=1-DecCos identity confirmed.
key_r4_results.r4b_ravel_probes: All 3 RAVEL hierarchies fail probe quality gate (best: 59.5%, gate: 85%). H3 cross-domain FALSIFIED.
key_r4_results.r4b_shuffled_control: Real absorption ≈ shuffled null for all domains. H3 contribution collapses.
key_r4_results.r4c_llama_replication: Llama-3.1-8B gated; weight-only analysis confirms EDA=1-DecCos identity. No AUROC possible.
